title: sutera aethiopica
intro: Sutera aethiopica, also known as Ethiopian snapdragon, is a plant species in the family Plantaginaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sutera aethiopica include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Sutera aethiopica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves and flowers can be used to make medicinal extracts.
